title: Climate Crisis Action Summit
summary: U.S. Senator Ed Markey hosts former EPA Administrator Gina McCarthy, former U.S., Special Envoy for Climate Change Todd Stern, and former Office of Science & Technology Policy Director John Holdren for a public forum at Belmont High School. The discussion was moderated by MA State Senator Will Brownsberger.
body: John Holdren participates in a Climate Action Summit organized by Senator Ed Markey that featured Gina McCarthy, Todd Stern, and Will Brownsberger. The event was broadcast by Belmont Media Center. Click here for more information.
